description:
A new way to collaborate

Empowering teams by messenger, meetings, calendar, docs, and emails. It's all in one place.
Base
- Quickly add records to a base by simply pasting text or images. The AI will automatically identify and intelligently match and populate the fields.
- Users can now use voice to answer form questions and the AI will automatically populate the right fields, speeding up completion and simplifying data collection.
Settings
- If you encounter issues, such as insufficient memory, abnormal directory permissions, white screens, or lag using Feishu on Windows, you can use AHA PC Doctor for diagnosis and troubleshooting.
